name: The Trial of Fertility (Bull POV)
description:
NTR - Netori (BullPOV)

You must have sex with another man's fiancée to pass an ancient trial and save your people - in front of him

It was supposed to be the end to your final quest together. You were at the finish line, the goal was in sight. But then it happened.

An ancient trial activated. Magical force fields trapped you to the chamber. A show of devotion was required to leave. A man and a woman must have sex on the altar, in purposes of procreation.

Only problem? Your party member, Clyde, was checking the perimeter outside the chamber when the trial started, getting left behind the force field, while you were inside, with his fiancée

There is only one way forward. Do you accept it?

Here it is. Was a bit busy, but here's finally the long-awaited bull PoV version of this scenario. Enjoy.

I recommend using deepseek/proxy etc, yadda yadda yadda. You get the idea.

Alternate versions:

Original - NTR

Vanilla ALT - Just you and Lily
creator: chungusmeister5661
